title: SimpleHarvest
description: A lightweight plugin that lets players right-click to harvest and auto-replant crops. Use hoes to earn XP and boost crop yields. Fully customizable for a tailored farming experience. rightclick harvest
body:
![SimpleHarvest Logo on crops](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/beb20ddf789e91368b89574bcbb0846c5c7e63c1.png)
**Enhance your farming experience with SimpleHarvest!**

The **SimpleHarvest** plugin for **Paper**, **Spigot**, and **Bukkit** allows players to:

- **Right-click to harvest crops** and **automatically replant** them, making farming more efficient and enjoyable.
  
- **Customizable hoe functionality**:  
  Each hoe type (**Wooden**, **Stone**, **Iron**, **Diamond**, **Golden**, **Netherite**) comes with configurable **harvest chances**, **multipliers**, and **durability loss** options.

- **XP drops**:  
  Receive **experience points** when using hoes to harvest crops, with configurable drop chances and amounts.

- **Crop drop multiplication**:  
  Increase the number of **drops** when using a hoe for harvesting.

- **Hoe durability**:  
  **Hoes take damage** with each use when harvesting crops, adding an extra layer of challenge.

---

**Recent Updates:**

- **Expanded crop support**: Added support for **Melons** and **Pumpkins**, now harvestable with right-click without replanting.
- **Cocoa Beans**: Full support for **Cocoa Beans**, which includes harvesting but **no replanting**. Planned future support for **automatic replanting** based on the orientation of adjacent **Jungle Logs**.
- **Farmland protection**: New setting to prevent farmland from being destroyed by players walking on it.

---

**Future Plans:**

- **Updating to newer Minecraft versions** as they are released to ensure continued compatibility.

---

**Dependencies:**

- No external dependencies required. **SimpleHarvest** works independently.

---

**Features:**

- Simple and intuitive configuration for **hoe behavior** and **crop harvest settings**.
- Fully customizable through the plugin's **configuration file**.
- Seamless integration with Minecraft farming mechanics.

---

**SimpleHarvest** is the perfect plugin to make farming more rewarding, efficient, and exciting on your server!

---

If you encounter any bugs, please report them to me via Discord!
